mapper.insert: INSERT INTO conversations (user1_id, user2_id, user1_nickname, user1_avatar, user2_nickname, user2_avatar, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{user1Id}, #{user2Id}, #{user1Nickname}, #{user1Avatar}, #{user2Nickname}, #{user2Avatar}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, CASE WHEN c.user1_id = #{userId} THEN c.user2_id ELSE c.user1_id END AS targetUserId, CASE WHEN c.user1_id = #{userId} THEN c.user2_nickname ELSE c.user1_nickname END AS targetNickname, CASE WHEN c.user1_id = #{userId} THEN c.user2_avatar ELSE c.user1_avatar END AS targetAvatar, c.last_message AS lastMessage, c.last_message_time AS lastMessageTime, CASE WHEN c.user1_id = #{userId} THEN c.user1_unread_count ELSE c.user2_unread_count END AS unreadCount FROM conversations c WHERE c.user1_id = #{userId} OR c.user2_id = #{userId} ORDER BY c.last_message_time DESC
